entry.title: New IDC 47QFLA19D0006 awarded to VIASAT, INC. for the amount of $784,313.73

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS AWARD IS FOR AN INDEFINITE-DELIVERY INDEFINITE-QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT FOR THE JOINT STAFF J6 RAPID MIGRATION C5AD CAPABILITY BEST PRACTICES PROJECT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:subcontractPlan.description: PLAN NOT INCLUDED - NO SUBCONTRACTING POSSIBILITIES

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE CATALOG LIST TO INCLUDE ELIN D033, PART NUMBER 13304013.
